title: ActionVersionDependency
description: Dependency is an npm module. These values are used to produce an immutable artifact, which manifests as a layer_id.

name.description: name is the name of the npm module, e.g. lodash

version.description: description is the version of the npm module, e.g. 4.17.1

registry_url.description: registry_url is an optional value used primarily for private npm registries.
